moments.title: Wimbledon Enters Finals Week
moments.blurb: The Championships, Wimbledon, continues this week with thrilling matches as the tournament progresses towards its highly anticipated finals on July 12.

angles.name: Centre Court Action
angles.copy: The grass court drama at Wimbledon is heating up! Who are you backing for the men's and women's singles titles as we head into the second week?

angles.name: British Hopes
angles.copy: Are any British hopefuls still serving up aces at Wimbledon? Keep an eye on the action as the competition gets fierce!

angles.name: Fashion on the Courts
angles.copy: Beyond the volleys and aces, Wimbledon is also a showcase for style. What's your favourite court-side fashion statement this year?

moments.title: British Grand Prix Kicks Off at Silverstone
moments.blurb: The Formula 1 Pirelli British Grand Prix 2026 roars into action today at Silverstone Circuit, with practice and sprint qualifying sessions leading up to Sunday's main race.

angles.name: Silverstone Start
angles.copy: Lights out, and away we go! The British Grand Prix weekend is officially underway at Silverstone. Who's your pick for pole position?

angles.name: Home Race Hopes
angles.copy: The roar of the engines fills Silverstone! Can a British driver or team claim victory on home soil this F1 weekend?

angles.name: Sprint Showdown
angles.copy: It's a Sprint weekend at Silverstone! Expect fast and furious action today with Sprint Qualifying setting the grid for tomorrow's Sprint Race.

moments.title: The Open Championship Preparations Begin
moments.blurb: Golf's 154th Open Championship at Royal Birkdale begins its practice days from July 12, building anticipation for the main tournament starting July 16.

angles.name: Claret Jug Countdown
angles.copy: The countdown to The Open at Royal Birkdale is on! Practice days kick off next week as the world's best golfers prepare for the iconic Claret Jug.

angles.name: Royal Birkdale Returns
angles.copy: Royal Birkdale is ready to host The Open for the 11th time. What's your favourite memory from this historic course?

moments.title: UK Singles Chart Update
moments.blurb: The battle for the top spot on the UK Singles Chart continues, with new entries and climbing hits vying for attention this week.

angles.name: Who's Number One?
angles.copy: Fresh week, fresh charts! Who do you think is dominating the UK Singles Chart right now? Drop your predictions!

angles.name: Chart Climbers
angles.copy: Beyond the top spot, which tracks are climbing fast and making waves on the UK Singles Chart this week?

moments.title: Legally Blonde Prequel 'Elle' Streaming Now
moments.blurb: The much-anticipated 'Legally Blonde' prequel series, 'Elle', which follows a teenage Elle Woods, premiered on Prime Video on July 1.

angles.name: What, like it's hard?
angles.copy: Omigod you guys, 'Elle' is here! The 'Legally Blonde' prequel is now streaming. Are you ready for more bend and snap?

angles.name: Teenage Elle
angles.copy: Before Harvard, there was high school. Dive into the world of a young Elle Woods in the new 'Legally Blonde' prequel, 'Elle', on Prime Video.

moments.title: Diane Morgan's 'Ann Droid' Hits BBC One
moments.blurb: Diane Morgan stars in the quirky new BBC comedy 'Ann Droid', where she plays a social humanoid robot designed to assist the elderly, premiering this July.

angles.name: New Comedy Alert
angles.copy: Diane Morgan as a robot? Yes please! Her new comedy 'Ann Droid' is on BBC One this July. Get ready for some deadpan laughs.

angles.name: Motherland Star Returns
angles.copy: If you loved Diane Morgan in 'Motherland', you won't want to miss her as a robot in 'Ann Droid' on BBC One. What could possibly go wrong?

moments.title: New 'Little House on the Prairie' Adaptation on Netflix
moments.blurb: A new adaptation of the beloved classic 'Little House on the Prairie' arrives on Netflix, streaming from July 9.

angles.name: Back to the Prairie
angles.copy: Get ready to revisit the Ingalls family! A new adaptation of 'Little House on the Prairie' lands on Netflix from July 9. Who's excited?

angles.name: Classic Reimagined
angles.copy: Sweeping landscapes and timeless storytelling return with Netflix's new 'Little House on the Prairie'. Perfect for a dose of wholesome drama.

moments.title: Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival in Birmingham
moments.blurb: The Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival takes over Moseley Park in Birmingham from July 10-12, celebrating groundbreaking UK and international music.

angles.name: Funk, Soul, Jazz Weekend
angles.copy: Get ready to groove! The Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival kicks off in Birmingham next weekend. Who's on your must-see list?

angles.name: Birmingham Beats
angles.copy: Moseley Park is about to get soulful! Don't miss the Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival, bringing big beats to Birmingham from July 10-12.

moments.title: UK Summer Weather Rollercoaster Continues
moments.blurb: The UK is set for a mixed bag of summer weather, with high pressure bringing rising temperatures and potential heatwave conditions in the south and east, while the risk of heavy showers and thunderstorms remains.

angles.name: Heatwave Watch
angles.copy: Grab your suncream (and maybe an umbrella)! Temperatures are set to rise, with heatwave conditions possible across parts of the UK next week.

angles.name: Classic British Summer
angles.copy: It's a classic British summer: sunshine, warmth, and a chance of thundery showers! Are you making the most of the changeable conditions?

moments.title: Live Music in Exeter Tonight
moments.blurb: Exeter's local music scene is buzzing tonight with SEKREMENT playing Bomba Live and Rameagle performing at The Monkey Suit.

angles.name: Exeter's Friday Night Beats
angles.copy: Looking for live music in Exeter tonight? Catch SEKREMENT at Bomba Live or Rameagle at The Monkey Suit! Get out and support local talent.

angles.name: Tonight in Exeter
angles.copy: Your Friday night plans sorted! There's live music happening across Exeter tonight. Where will you be heading for your dose of local tunes?

moments.title: Happy 76th Birthday, Huey Lewis!
moments.blurb: The iconic frontman of Huey Lewis and the News, Huey Lewis, celebrates his 76th birthday on Sunday, July 5.

angles.name: It's Hip to Be Square
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 76th Birthday to the legendary Huey Lewis on Sunday! What's your favourite Huey Lewis and the News track?

angles.name: Power of Love
angles.copy: He's still got the 'Power of Love'! Happy 76th Birthday to the one and only Huey Lewis this Sunday!

moments.title: Happy 86th Birthday, Ringo Starr!
moments.blurb: The legendary drummer of The Beatles, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday on Monday, July 7.

angles.name: Peace and Love
angles.copy: Sending out 'Peace and Love' for Ringo Starr's 86th birthday on Monday! What's your favourite Beatles track featuring his iconic drumming?

angles.name: Legendary Drummer
angles.copy: From The Beatles to his solo career, Ringo Starr is a true legend. Happy 86th Birthday to the man himself this Monday!

moments.title: Happy 56th Birthday, Beck!
moments.blurb: The genre-bending musician Beck Hansen celebrates his 56th birthday on Tuesday, July 8.

angles.name: Alternative Icon
angles.copy: Happy 56th Birthday to the one-of-a-kind Beck this Tuesday! What's your favourite track from the 'Loser' hitmaker?

angles.name: Modern Master
angles.copy: From 'Odelay' to 'Morning Phase', Beck continues to innovate. Wishing him a very Happy 56th Birthday on Tuesday!

moments.title: Happy 69th Birthday, Marc Almond!
moments.blurb: The distinctive voice of Soft Cell and solo artist, Marc Almond, celebrates his 69th birthday on Wednesday, July 9.

angles.name: Tainted Love for Marc
angles.copy: Happy 69th Birthday to the brilliant Marc Almond this Wednesday! From Soft Cell to his incredible solo work, what's your favourite track?

angles.name: Synth-Pop Icon
angles.copy: The unique sound of Marc Almond turns 69 this Wednesday! Celebrate with a spin of Soft Cell's greatest hits.

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday, Arlo Guthrie!
moments.blurb: The folk music legend Arlo Guthrie, known for 'Alice's Restaurant', celebrates his 79th birthday on Thursday, July 10.

angles.name: Alice's Restaurant Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 79th Birthday to folk icon Arlo Guthrie this Thursday! Time for a listen to 'Alice's Restaurant'?

angles.name: Folk Storyteller
angles.copy: A true American storyteller, Happy 79th Birthday to Arlo Guthrie on Thursday! His music continues to resonate through the decades.

moments.title: Happy 67th Birthday, Suzanne Vega!
moments.blurb: The acclaimed singer-songwriter Suzanne Vega, known for hits like 'Luka' and 'Tom's Diner', celebrates her 67th birthday on Friday, July 11.

angles.name: Luka, Tom's Diner & More
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday to the brilliant Suzanne Vega this Friday! Her distinctive voice and storytelling have captivated us for decades.

angles.name: Singer-Songwriter Icon
angles.copy: Celebrate Suzanne Vega's 67th Birthday this Friday by listening to her timeless tracks. What's your favourite?

moments.title: Happy 67th Birthday, Richie Sambora!
moments.blurb: The legendary guitarist of Bon Jovi, Richie Sambora, celebrates his 67th birthday on Friday, July 11.

angles.name: Bon Jovi Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Living on a prayer for Richie Sambora's 67th Birthday this Friday! The iconic Bon Jovi guitarist is still rocking.

angles.name: Rock Legend
angles.copy: From stadium anthems to searing solos, Happy 67th Birthday to Richie Sambora this Friday! What's your favourite Bon Jovi classic?

moments.title: Happy 84th Birthday, Roger McGuinn!
moments.blurb: The influential co-founder of The Byrds, Roger McGuinn, celebrates his 84th birthday on Sunday, July 13.

angles.name: Byrds Legend
angles.copy: To everything (turn, turn, turn), there is a season... for Happy 84th Birthday wishes to Roger McGuinn this Sunday! The Byrds co-founder is a true pioneer.

angles.name: Folk-Rock Pioneer
angles.copy: A visionary in folk-rock, Happy 84th Birthday to Roger McGuinn this Sunday! His influence on music is undeniable.
